You are asked questions about a synthetic world. You are given NO background material — only the question itself. If you cannot know the answer, give your best guess in the required format anyway.
Answer format: for true/false questions reply with exactly one word, true or false. For list questions reply with a JSON array of entity IDs, e.g. ["customer_03","customer_07"], or [] if none.

Question: On day 360, across frames [actual, asset_00, partner_05, partner_09], list every sector value X such that member_of(customer=customer_03, sector=?X, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_04) holds, labeling each value with the frame it holds in. Answer as (value, frame) pairs (possibly empty).
Structured form: {"at_day":360,"find_slot":"sector","pattern":{"relation":"rel_b09_member_of","args":{"customer":{"const":"customer_03"},"jurisdiction":{"const":"jurisdiction_04"},"sector":{"var":"X"}}}}
